items.name: Vault Jumpsuit
items.description:
I don't want to set the world on fire....

Inspired by the Fallout Vault Dweller Jumpsuit ! **NOT a replica or recreation**
This detailed realistic blue and yellow vault suit has PBR texturing ! It may look dark in the preview, but it is actually very detailed in-game.

Goes perfect with leather armor:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17346529309/Wastelanders-Leather-Armor

Become your own fall out vault dweller , and conquer the wasteland with this retro outfit !

Want color variants and more? Leave a favorite!
